captions.formal: A light-colored dog wearing a red collar enters a sunlit grassy meadow and runs across the field toward the tree.
captions.sarcastic: Oh sure, just run off into the sunset like a dramatic movie scene.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Dog sees the big shiny ball of light in the sky and decides today is the day to chase it.

captions.formal: A camera pans across an urban waterfront skyline featuring skyscrapers, boats, and a large convention center.
captions.sarcastic: Oh great, another majestic skyline pan because we definitely needed to see every single skyscraper.
captions.humorous_tech: Looks like the camera is running a slow forEach loop across the city skyline.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Like watching a slow-motion parade of skyscrapers while boats just sit there judging us.

captions.formal: A vibrant sunset casts pink and orange light across rippling water beneath a cloud-filled sky.
captions.sarcastic: Oh great, the sky is showing off with its pink and orange sunset over the water again.
captions.humorous_tech: The sky's render pipeline is pushing serious pink and orange shaders onto the water's surface tonight.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The sky dressed in pink and orange tonight while the water matched the outfit perfectly.

captions.formal: An orange kitten walks forward through green foliage and branches on a dirt path.
captions.sarcastic: Oh sure, just strut through the bushes like you pay rent here, tiny orange menace.
captions.humorous_tech: Looks like the kitten just merged its branch into main and deployed to production.
captions.humorous_non_tech: When your coworker says I'll just be five minutes and vanishes into the bushes.

captions.formal: A time-lapse recording captures the steady flow of vehicular traffic along a multi-lane urban thoroughfare, bordered by trees displaying autumn.
captions.sarcastic: Oh look, another time-lapse of cars doing exactly what cars do best — sitting in traffic while the trees put.
captions.humorous_tech: Behold, the ancient algorithm of rush hour: O(n) cars entering the scene, O(n) cars exiting, and one stubborn traffic light.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The trees are showing off their yellow outfits, the buildings are standing around like bored parents, and the cars are.

captions.formal: Pedestrians and vehicles navigate a busy multi-lane urban intersection surrounded by tall buildings displaying large billboards.
captions.sarcastic: Another perfectly choreographed chaos of humans and buses pretending they actually know where they are going.
captions.humorous_tech: This intersection runs on spaghetti code with zero documentation and somehow still compiles every single day.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Like a family dinner where everyone insists on crossing the street at the exact same chaotic moment.

captions.formal: A woman types on a keyboard while working at a computer monitor in a modern office.
captions.sarcastic: Oh look, another office worker pretending those tangled cables are a deliberate aesthetic choice.
captions.humorous_tech: Her keyboard input is being processed faster than her tangled cables can debug themselves.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Typing away at work while those cables look exactly like my morning headphone situation.

captions.formal: An aerial view captures rocky mountain peaks covered in dense green forest extending toward a distant city.
captions.sarcastic: Another drone shot of mountains proving the hike back down is the real adventure.
captions.humorous_tech: This mountain range looks like an unoptimized render with too many vertices and zero garbage collection.
captions.humorous_non_tech: These mountains look like my laundry pile after I promised myself I'd fold it this weekend.

captions.formal: A person types on a silver laptop keyboard with both hands, one wearing a silver ring.
captions.sarcastic: Groundbreaking stuff, fingers tapping a laptop keyboard like the internet hasn't seen that before.
captions.humorous_tech: Looks like someone's fingers are running an infinite loop over the keyboard without comments.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Typing on a laptop keyboard is like playing piano, except nobody applauds when you finish.

captions.formal: A forward-facing view from inside a vehicle traveling along a wet urban street at night.
captions.sarcastic: Oh great, another moody night drive through a rain-soaked city — because nothing says 'I have my life together' like.
captions.humorous_tech: Behold, the bokeh.exe has fully taken over the windshield, rendering all light sources as dreamy orbs while the traffic light.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The windshield is crying, the street is glowing, and the traffic light finally decided to be nice — welcome to.

captions.formal: Three friends sit at a rooftop table with three beers, engaged in conversation while smiling and gesturing.
captions.sarcastic: Three friends sit at a rooftop table with three beers, clearly having a better conversation than yours.
captions.humorous_tech: Three friends sit at a rooftop table with three beers, running a social script with zero bugs detected.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Three friends sit at a rooftop table with three beers, laughing like they just heard juicy gossip.

captions.formal: Ocean waves continuously roll and break onto a pebbly beach beneath a green-covered coastal cliff.
captions.sarcastic: Wow, another wave crashes onto the pebbly beach, truly the most groundbreaking event of the century.
captions.humorous_tech: These ocean waves keep retrying their connection to the shore but the pebbles keep rejecting them.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The ocean keeps sending waves to the beach like texts to an ex who won't reply.

captions.formal: A train arrives at a station platform where passengers wait on benches and stand near the tracks.
captions.sarcastic: Oh wonderful, the train finally showed up after everyone rehearsed their impatient sighs.
captions.humorous_tech: Looks like the train's deployment to production finally succeeded after waiting in the staging environment.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The train pulls in like a late dinner guest while everyone pretends they weren't waiting.

captions.formal: A chef in a striped apron carefully transfers diced zucchini from a knife blade onto a wooden cutting board in.
captions.sarcastic: Oh look, another cooking video where someone dramatically scrapes vegetables off a knife like it's a culinary masterpiece.
captions.humorous_tech: This visual process is like a loop running without any termination condition.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The zucchini is having a great time riding the knife slide until it lands on its friends on the cutting.

captions.formal: A man in a gray shirt and blue shorts runs across an outdoor track past empty stadium seats.
captions.sarcastic: Wow, a whole stadium of empty seats just to watch one guy jog by himself.
captions.humorous_tech: Looks like the stadium render optimization kicked in and culled every spectator except the lone runner.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Reserved a whole stadium for his morning jog, talk about having the place to yourself.
